title: ANTI DOMESTIC AND SEXUAL VIOLENCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: SELF ENHANCEMENT INC COMMUNITY & FAMILY PROGRAMS ANTI DOMESTIC AND SEXUAL VIOLENCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers safe and confidential services to survivors of domestic and sexual violence including advocacy, case management, support groups, safety planning, relocation assistance, emergency, medical and judicial accompaniments, and referrals to other resources. 310 NE Failing Street Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week. Calls placed outside of Monday-Friday 9am-5pm and holidays are forwarded to Call to Safety. Email (503) 972-3698 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (503) 972-3698 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Domestic Violence Support Groups * African American Community Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups * African American Community Specialized Information and Referral * Domestic Violence Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - SHORT TERM RENTAL ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD WELFARE ADVOCACY UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
